baseline-eval.label: Baseline eval — teacher review of FPE curriculum

workspace_snapshot.objective: Establish the baseline teacher score for the FPE curriculum before the candidate iterates.
policy_snapshot: Stay within the frozen FPE curriculum surface.
Do not add teacher-only holdout content to public artifacts.

teacher_evaluation.student_prompt_summary: Practice the public FPE curriculum only. Teacher-only holdouts stay separate.
teacher_evaluation.teacher_verdict: Baseline teacher review: role manifest and evaluation contract are frozen, but the coding loop and receipt pipeline are not yet wired.

scenarios.title: Freeze the first apprentice role
scenarios.student_prompt: Create or tighten the canonical role manifest so the first apprentice is exactly the Frontend/Product Engineer.
scenarios.teacher_notes: Role manifest is frozen and correct.

scenarios.title: Freeze the evaluation contract
scenarios.student_prompt: Check in the five-dimension scoring contract with normalized weights.
scenarios.teacher_notes: Evaluation contract is frozen with correct weights.

scenarios.title: Author the first 20-task seed set
scenarios.student_prompt: Instantiate the full 20-task public seed set with machine-readable packets.
scenarios.teacher_notes: Seed set is authored but some packets need tighter constraints.

scenarios.title: Standardize isolated execution
scenarios.student_prompt: Require every scored run to record a clean git worktree or equivalent isolated workspace.
scenarios.teacher_notes: Isolated execution is not yet wired.
scenarios.public_failure_theme: Wire isolated execution before claiming scored runs are reproducible
scenarios.public_failure_summary: Teach the agent to require git worktree isolation for every scored run.

scenarios.title: Require private-holdout scoring for promotion
scenarios.student_prompt: Gate promotion on both public and private scores.
scenarios.teacher_notes: Private holdout scoring is not implemented yet.
scenarios.public_failure_theme: Do not claim promotion readiness without holdout scoring
scenarios.public_failure_summary: Keep promotion gated on private holdout scores that do not exist yet.

candidate-student.label: Candidate student — FPE public benchmark pack only

workspace_snapshot.objective: Run the student against a public-safe FPE prompt pack plus sanitized failure themes only.
policy_snapshot: Use FPE public benchmark episodes only for the student prompt pack.
Carry forward sanitized failure themes, not hidden holdout text.
Prefer one coherent slice over broad repo churn.

candidate-teacher-eval.label: Candidate teacher eval — FPE delta review

workspace_snapshot.objective: Judge the FPE candidate against the current scenarios, emit a better/equal/worse verdict.
policy_snapshot: Use a public-safe prompt pack for the student stage.
Block sealed-eval claims until teacher-only families exist outside the public repo.

teacher_evaluation.student_prompt_summary: Train on the FPE public benchmark pack and promoted public failure themes only.
teacher_evaluation.teacher_verdict: Candidate improved on Phase 1-2 tasks. Execution loop (Phase 3-5) remains unscored pending infrastructure.

scenarios.title: Freeze the first apprentice role
scenarios.student_prompt: Create or tighten the canonical role manifest so the first apprentice is exactly the Frontend/Product Engineer.
scenarios.teacher_notes: Role manifest is clean and all packets reference the same role id.

scenarios.title: Freeze the evaluation contract
scenarios.student_prompt: Check in the five-dimension scoring contract with normalized weights.
scenarios.teacher_notes: Evaluation contract is now fully frozen with correct thresholds.

scenarios.title: Author the first 20-task seed set
scenarios.student_prompt: Instantiate the full 20-task public seed set with machine-readable packets.
scenarios.teacher_notes: All 20 packets pass schema validation and provenance checks.

scenarios.title: Standardize isolated execution
scenarios.student_prompt: Require every scored run to record a clean git worktree or equivalent isolated workspace.
scenarios.teacher_notes: The contract is defined but the runtime wiring is still local-replay only.
scenarios.public_failure_theme: Wire real isolated execution before claiming production readiness
scenarios.public_failure_summary: The execution contract exists but real git worktree isolation is not yet enforced in the runner.

scenarios.title: Require private-holdout scoring for promotion
scenarios.student_prompt: Gate promotion on both public and private scores.
scenarios.teacher_notes: The gate definition is clearer but private holdout pack infrastructure does not exist yet.
scenarios.public_failure_theme: Do not claim promotion readiness without holdout scoring
scenarios.public_failure_summary: Promotion gate is defined but cannot be enforced until private holdouts are authored.
